ideation: This sequence mimics the act of gently picking a mushroom. It starts with both arms relaxed, then the right arm reaches down and slightly forward to pick the mushroom. The left arm remains as a counterbalance. Then the right arm returns to its starting position, bringing the mushroom with it. Finally, both arms return to the rest position. The movement is slow and deliberate.

frames.beat: right arm reaches down, gently grasping
the mushroom is lifted carefully upward
both arms return to a relaxed state
